scripts.docker:up: docker-compose up -d && echo 'Waiting for services to initialize...' && powershell -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 20" && cd database && pnpm install && pnpm run seed
scripts.docker:up:l1: docker-compose up -d postgres identity-service marketplace-service payment-service comms-service oversight-service api-gateway && echo 'Waiting for services to initialize...' && powershell -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 15" && cd database && pnpm install && pnpm run seed
scripts.docker:up:l2: docker-compose --profile cache up -d && echo 'Waiting for services to initialize...' && powershell -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 15" && cd database && pnpm install && pnpm run seed
scripts.docker:up:l3: docker-compose --profile infrastructure up -d && echo 'Waiting for services to initialize...' && powershell -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 15" && cd database && pnpm install && pnpm run seed
scripts.docker:up:l4: docker-compose --profile events --profile email --profile sms up -d && echo 'Waiting for services to initialize...' && powershell -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 15" && cd database && pnpm install && pnpm run seed
scripts.test:api: newman run docs/Local-Service-Marketplace.postman_collection.json --environment newman/newman.env.json --reporters cli,html,json --reporter-html-export test-reports/report.html --reporter-json-export test-reports/report.json
scripts.test:api:verbose: newman run docs/Local-Service-Marketplace.postman_collection.json --environment newman/newman.env.json --reporters cli,html,json --reporter-html-export test-reports/report.html --reporter-json-export test-reports/report.json --verbose
